productDisplayName: Nike Men's As T90 SS White Blue T-shirt
description: CompositionWhite V-neck training t-shirt made of 100% polyester Dri-Fit fabric, with blue panel and sublimated print, heat transfer swoosh logo and T90 lettering on the chest, mesh back panel and contrast tape at side seamFittingComfortWash care Machine wash in cold water or hand wash separately Do not use softeners Do not bleach Tumble dry on low Cool iron Do not iron on design Do not dry clean Get ready to score goals in style in this lightweight nike T90 football training tee. This high-performance tee made of Dri-Fit fabric offers superior ventilation and comfort, helping you play longer. Team this with perfromance shorts and nike soccer cleats for superb action on the football field.
